Contract must hold >= 32 STT before this call."},"handleResponse(uint256,(address,bytes,uint8,uint256,uint256,uint256)[],uint8,(uint256,address,address,bytes4,address[],(address,bytes,uint8,uint256,uint256,uint256)[],uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint8,uint8,uint256,uint256))":{"notice":"Somnia validators call this after consensus on the ETH price. The price is consensus-validated across multiple validators."},"onEvent(address,bytes32[],bytes)":{"notice":"Default function invoked for a matching reactivity subscription filter"},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"notice":"Returns whether this contract supports the requested interface id."}},"notice":"The living world. Two Somnia-native primitives in one contract:         1. REACTIVE CONTRACTS \u2014 Subscribes to Arena's MatchResolved event.            Somnia validators call _onEvent() automatically after every match.            No keeper. No cron. No human. The world updates itself.         2. JSON API AGENT \u2014 Every 50 battles, fetches ETH price from CoinGecko            via Somnia's consensus-validated JSON API agent. Multiple validators            independently fetch and agree on the result before it enters the chain.            This real-world signal modifies god aggression \u2014 the world reacts to reality.         IMPORTANT: Must hold >= 32 STT for reactive subscriptions + STT for JSON API calls.         JSON API cost: 0.1 STT/agent \u00d7 3 validators = 0.3 STT + 0.03 reserve = 0.33 STT per params.data: Event data for non-indexed event arguments. May be empty if event only has indexed params
params.emitter: Smart contract that emitted the EVM event log(s)
params.eventTopics: List of event topics associated with the event (event signature being first param)

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Allows the Somnia reactivity precompile to reason about support for reactivity subscriptions.

params.interfaceId: Interface identifier as defined by ERC-165.

activate(address).notice: Set Arena and activate the reactive subscription.         Contract must hold >= 32 STT before this call.

handleResponse(uint256,(address,bytes,ui.notice: Somnia validators call this after consensus on the ETH price.         NOT called by any human. The price is consensus-validated across multiple validators.

onEvent(address,bytes32[],bytes).notice: Default function invoked for a matching reactivity subscription filter

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Returns whether this contract supports the requested interface id.
